action.reasoning: Observation: train_wavlm.py fails because CodecAugDataset tries to access self.data which doesn't exist in ASVspoofDataset parent. I need to check dataset.py to understand the attribute names. The eval framework issue persists but I should keep submitting. Decision: Fix train_wavlm.py by not relying on parent's internal attributes - instead read the protocol file directly in CodecAugDataset.__init__. Also submit eval with current best checkpoint.
